summary: Iteration 7: Comprehensive testing of 12-point feature enhancement. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified admin dashboard with reminders, financial chart (12 bars), admin users page with 'Dodaj clanarinu' and 'Historija' buttons, admin bookings page without Instructor column. Schedule page 10-day limit code verified.

minor.issue: Requires all fields (uses PackageCreateRequest) - not a partial update. This is by design but could be improved for UX.

passed_tests: GET /api/packages returns packages from MongoDB (5+ packages) - PASSED
POST /api/admin/manual-income creates manual income entry - PASSED
GET /api/admin/manual-income returns all entries - PASSED
DELETE /api/admin/manual-income/{id} deletes entry - PASSED
POST /api/admin/reminders creates reminder - PASSED
GET /api/admin/reminders returns all reminders - PASSED
POST /api/admin/reminders/{id}/toggle toggles status - PASSED
DELETE /api/admin/reminders/{id} deletes reminder - PASSED
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/custom-membership creates membership directly - PASSED
GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/membership-history returns history - PASSED
GET /api/admin/financial returns ovaj_mjesec_prihod, ovaj_mjesec_paketi, ovaj_mjesec_rucni - PASSED
GET /api/admin/financial returns 12-month revenue data - PASSED
POST /api/admin/revenue/archive archives month's revenue - PASSED
GET /api/admin/packages returns all packages including inactive - PASSED
POST /api/admin/packages creates new package - PASSED
PUT /api/admin/packages/{id} updates package - PASSED
DELETE /api/admin/packages/{id} soft-deletes (deactivates) package - PASSED
approved_by field exists on approved package requests - PASSED
UI: Admin dashboard loads with stat cards - PASSED
UI: Admin dashboard shows Podsjetnici (reminders) section - PASSED
UI: Admin dashboard shows Finansijski pregled section - PASSED
UI: Admin dashboard shows 12-month revenue chart (12 bars) - PASSED
UI: Admin users page shows 'Dodaj clanarinu' button - PASSED
UI: Admin users page shows 'Historija' button - PASSED
UI: Admin bookings page does NOT show Instruktor column - PASSED
Code: Schedule page implements 10-day limit (maxDate = today + 9) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: All 12-point enhancement features are implemented and working correctly
Packages are now stored in MongoDB with CRUD operations
Manual income tracking fully functional with create/read/delete
Studio reminders with toggle and delete functionality
Custom memberships bypass package request flow
Financial overview includes ovaj_mjesec_prihod, ovaj_mjesec_paketi, ovaj_mjesec_rucni
12-month revenue chart data is returned correctly
approved_by field is set when admin approves package requests
Instructor column removed from admin bookings page
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Created TEST_ prefixed data for testing which was cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12-point enhancement features are working. Backend APIs fully tested with pytest. Frontend admin dashboard shows reminders section, financial section with 12-month chart, stat cards. Admin users page has 'Dodaj clanarinu' and 'Historija' buttons. Admin bookings page correctly hides Instructor column. Schedule page 10-day limit is implemented in code (maxDate = today + 9 days). Phone OTP is MOCKED (always 123456).

mocked_apis.phone_otp: Always returns 123456 - SMS not actually sent

features_verified.17_dashboard_ui: Admin dashboard shows stat cards, reminders, financial chart
features_verified.18_users_buttons: Admin users page shows 'Dodaj clanarinu' and 'Historija' buttons
features_verified.19_bookings_no_instructor: Admin bookings page does NOT show Instructor column
